data.label: PixUI
data.description: PixUI 是一个实现了 H5ES 标准的跨平台 UI 引擎，旨在将强大易用的 H5 技术和工作流引入游戏和原生 App 开发，让开发者快速开发出与游戏引擎原生效果一致的 UI 界面，并通过 GPU 实现毫秒级渲染。

data.label: PixUI
data.description: PixUI is a cross-platform UI engine implementing the H5ES standard, designed to bring powerful and user-friendly H5 technology and workflows to game and native app development. It allows developers to quickly create UIs matching native game engine effects, achieving millisecond-level rendering via the GPU.
